title: Solace NerdPack
description: A modpack made by the town of Solace for the Nerd.Nu Minecraft servers.
body:
**Created by and for the Nerd.Nu Gaming Community**

This modpack is created by the town of Solace for the Nerd.Nu Minecraft servers. Being mostly visual tweaks and quality of life enhancements, this mod should work on other servers as well without too much difficulty.
